programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A grieving woman doesn't hold back while remembering her murdered granddaughter; a judge shows mercy on a young father by giving him work release instead of jail time; a defendant escapes from the courthouse.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge lashes out at a defense attorney who refers to his drunk driving client as a hero; a religious leader convicted of sexual abuse hears from his victims.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man in custody attempts a daring escape from court; a sovereign citizen argues with a judge about laws; a convicted killer makes a defiant statement at her sentencing.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A convicted murderer has a violent reaction as courtroom deputies take him into custody; a judge refuses to give in to the pleas for mercy from a repeat drug offender; a woman found guilty of probation violation escapes the courtroom.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man named Edward Cocaine appears in court for unlawful possession of Xanax; two sisters confront the man who killed their little brother; the judge admonishes a model accused of assaulting a 16-year-old boy she says was bullying her son.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A reckless driver ends up in court after a shocking car chase caught on camera; an obscene screen name gets a defendant in hot water; a Hollywood actress ends up in jail.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man charged with murder attempts a bold escape; an attorney is attacked by his own client; a man blames his pet for cursing at a judge.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A shocking courthouse shootout ends with deadly consequences; a defendant who is given a life sentence explodes; a rap superstar gives a courtroom performance to remember.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Garland, Texas, Flash Shelton and his team help a family repossess their deceased brother's home from a squatter who moved in on the day that their brother died.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: The team head to Conroe, Texas, to help a grieving family reclaim their late grandmother's home from a squatter couple who moved in after her passing; tensions run high when the couple resists leaving.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cle Elum, Washington, Casey lost her dream home to a stranger who claimed it as her own for over 4 months and even tried to rent rooms out to other people for profit; but when Flash and his team move in, will their tactics be enough for this squatter to finally leave once and for all?

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: After a long, high-speed chase, deputies discover a one-year-old girl in the back of the suspect's car; a Good Samaritan gives an out-of-breath officer a ride in his car to make up some ground during a foot pursuit.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Police and Highway Patrol pull a shoplifting suspect to safety after he hangs from a highway overpass; deputies, air units and K-9 officers chase down a suspect on foot and in the water.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers pursue fugitives on the run; officers chase a stolen car with the victim's one-year-old boy still in the back seat; an armed suspect who claims to be "CIA" flees from a traffic stop and rams a police cruiser.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A man wanted for assault pulls a gun on a police officer and then steals his cruiser; a high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect's car bursts into flames; a wanted man fleeing from officers in a semi-truck appears to be heading for the Canadian border; and more.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A truck thief streams his high-speed chase on social media; a man wanted for double murder fires shots at pursuing officers; a man caught sleeping at a traffic light flees police and crashes a high-end sports car; and more.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A deputy's K-9 partner follows a shooting suspect by jumping off a 40-foot-high bridge; a fugitive in a stolen pick-up truck throws a sledgehammer into the path of pursuing deputies.

programme.title: Perfect Pub Walks with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: Chris McCausland joins Xander on three monumental Monmouthshire meanders, and chats about his family, career and expectations of others.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers hit the sofa for the biggest and best TV.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Will former mayor Tracey take the plunge with toilet roll salesman Stuart? And can burlesque dancer Double D and professional singer Lee come together and hit all the right notes.

programme.title: TFI Friday Unplugged
programme.desc: Chris Evans hosts his iconic show. Tonight's guests include Bob Odenkirk, Danny Dyer, Emilia Clarke, Nigel Ng, Tom Ogden and Joe Donovan from Blossoms, and Gary Lightbody.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Coconuts are doused in vinegar, glue and Alex Horne's hair. Kumail Nanjiani shows off his super-human jaw strength. And don't be alarmed, it's just Joanna Page screaming... again.

programme.title: How to Build a Girl
programme.desc: Caitlin Moran's coming-of-age comedy based on her own experiences of trying to make it as a music journo in London. Cool people are the worst.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon makes the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant in Redondo Beach owned by Faye and her niece Brenda.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Anstey Hall in Cambridge, where father and son John and Johnny de Bruyne hope to impress their guests with an afternoon of goose herding and a formal dinner.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the clothes-free Clover Spa and Hotel in Birmingham, where owner Tim Higgs plans to convert his rivals to the joys of naturism.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mark Davidson and Layla Caton are determined to deliver a heavenly stay at The Angel Hotel in Coleford, Gloucestershire. But manners slip over dinner and there's confusion at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Higher Gitcombe in Totnes, Devon, run by Lynnie and Paul Jolly. But not everyone is impressed by their efforts to spoil their guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the last day of the competition, the B&Bers tackle negative feedback about self-service breakfast and an indecent find, before the payments are revealed and the winner is announced.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie's worried when her friend Danny overcharges her gynaecologist (guest star Judge Reinhold) for some gardening work.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie worries that she may lose her job. Doug's in Deacon's bad books.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: While Carrie cooks Thanksgiving dinner for 10 people, Doug lets a stranger into the house..

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: When Carrie loses her job, she eventually decides to set up her own business. But how successful will it be.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: After hurting themselves during a tryst, Ray and Debra say they fell down the stairs. But when Frank gets hurt doing some DIY, they begin to feel guilty.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie's good intentions backfire when they try to drive Robert back into Amy's arms - and find out that Amy and Gianni are hitting it off.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: US mystery series about a crime writer who turns sleuth. Castle and Beckett probe the death of a famous psychic who seems to have predicted her own murder.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: A coded clue leads Beckett, Castle and a cast of unusual suspects on a treasure hunt to recover some long-since buried booty.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Open water swimmer Mary O'Hagan found her life impacted by unprecedented algae blooms in Lough Neagh. She tells the story of how she created a campaign group called Save Our Shores.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: The opportunity to see a totally black sky unaffected by light pollution is rare. But lack of such pollution means stars can be seen more clearly at Northumberland National Park.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan explores the Borders, east coast and Edinburgh, visiting iconic aircraft Concorde, historic Musselburgh, and more. She also hears of the real-life inspiration for Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A suspected drink driver tries to ram interceptors off the road. And the drone and dog teams pursue a suspected drink driver after he hits Tarnia in the face and legs it.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Police hunt a man wanted on suspicion of stalking, but the operation spirals into a standoff. And officers head to remote woodland, where a wanted man is believed to be in hiding.

programme.title: The Ex-Wife
programme.desc: Three years after the events of the first series Tasha and Emily are living in Cyprus under fake names. While Jen plans her wedding, Tasha finds out about Jack's early prison release.

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: All My Best Bits

programme.title: Piers Morgan: Uncensored
programme.desc: The bold, opinion-led news and debate show hosted by Piers Morgan. Piers blends journalism, debates and cultural commentary that's unapologetically direct.

programme.title: Car Pound Cops
programme.desc: Officers spot a vehicle that hasn't been taxed for over three months. After pulling over the driver the officers uncover that the driver has also yet to pass his test..
